text:
Fake (, rom. Feiku) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. When used, it will transform itself into a restricted card from 1-99. The result is purely to scam other players as the transformed copy does not count as a proper card.
__NOTOC__

Summary

When cast, this card randomly transforms into a restricted card. The resulting card does not retain any abilities of the new card and does not count as an official card, nor does it affect the maximum card conversion limit. "Fake" can be undone using the Paladin's Necklace.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.1020 :: 贋作 
「贋作」をNo.001から099のいずれか1枚のカードに変化させる。変身したカードは指定ポケットに入れることは出来るが、コンプリートカードの対象にはならないし、アイテム化も出来ない。カード化限界枚数にもカウントされない。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1020 :: Fake 
"Fake" can be used to transform into any 1 card from No.001 to 099. The transformed card can be inserted to the specific pocket, but cannot be used as a complete card or itemized. The card is not counted on the "card limit".
|}

Trivia

In Chapter 153, Michiro used a fake card to try and scam Gon out of a "Favor Cushion", but his attempt is thwarted by Gon's Paladin's Necklace.
